entry.title: yanmoais/codex-gateway-lite
entry.summary:
Lightweight Codex Desktop gateway bootstrapper with model catalog, CDP injection, and protocol proxy support.
Language: Rust | Stars: 7

entry.title: xingranya/GitHub-Stars-AI-Tools
entry.summary:
本地优先的 GitHub Stars AI 桌面应用，可 AI 检索/解析已 Star 项目。Local-first AI desktop app for GitHub Stars.
Language: TypeScript | Stars: 62

entry.title: crimeacs/claude-note
entry.summary:
Your AI pair programmer's memory, synced to Obsidian
Language: Python | Stars: 66

entry.title: iansinnott/obsidian-claude-code-mcp
entry.summary:
Connect Claude Code and other AI tools to your Obsidian notes using Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Language: TypeScript | Stars: 313

entry.title: coleam00/claude-memory-compiler
entry.summary:
Give Claude Code a memory that evolves with your codebase. Hooks automatically capture sessions, the Claude Agent SDK extracts key decisions and lessons, and an LLM compiler organizes everything into structured, cross-referenced knowledge articles - inspired by Karpathy's LLM Knowledge Base architecture.
Language: Python | Stars: 1237

entry.title: coleam00/second-brain-starter
entry.summary:
Build your own AI Second Brain with Claude Code - a skill that generates a personalized PRD for a proactive, persistent AI assistant
Language: Unknown | Stars: 672

entry.title: ballred/obsidian-claude-pkm
entry.summary:
A complete starter kit for an Obsidian + Claude Code personal knowledge management system.
Language: Shell | Stars: 1558

entry.title: YishenTu/claudian
entry.summary:
An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code/Codex as an AI collaborator in your vault
Language: TypeScript | Stars: 13797
